proxbot third-party dependency inventory
Generated from the repository's committed lockfiles. Copyright and license terms remain with each project.
# Third-Party Notices

proxbot's separately executed iOS provider bundles open-source dependencies. The source repository remains public and the provider communicates with the desktop core through a documented MessagePack IPC boundary.

## pymobiledevice3 9.12.0

- Project: https://github.com/doronz88/pymobiledevice3
- License: GNU General Public License v3.0
- Purpose: paired iPhone discovery, lockdown services, packet capture, and syslog collection.
- Corresponding source: the exact upstream tag/version is available from the project link and is pinned in `sidecars/ios-provider/uv.lock`.

The complete dependency resolution is recorded in `sidecars/ios-provider/uv.lock`. Individual packages retain their own copyright and license terms.
